education.degree: Bachelor of Arts in Theater Arts

experience.title: Production Assistant
responsibilities: Assisted in the organization and execution of live performances and theater productions.
Collaborated with various departments including lighting, sound, and set design to ensure timely completion of projects.
Maintained schedules and managed logistical needs for rehearsals and performances.
Communicated with cast and crew to coordinate schedules and production needs.

experience.title: Theater Instructor
responsibilities: Developed and taught curriculum for theater arts to students of various ages.
Conducted workshops on acting techniques, voice modulation, and stage presence.
Organized end-of-semester performances showcasing students' talents.
Engaged students in creative exercises to enhance their artistic expression.

response.summary: Enthusiastic theater arts professional transitioning into a new career path. Proven ability to manage projects and collaborate with diverse teams, seeking to leverage communication and organizational skills in a new role.
